children.name: ValidateAndPrepareSend
children.purpose: Validate that the user is a member of the target channel and prepare the message data for storage.
children.behavior: Check if user_id is in the members list of the channel identified by channel_id from the channels store. If not, return error. Otherwise, prepare a new message entry with content, user_id, channel_id, and current timestamp.
children.signature: def ValidateAndPrepareSend(command: str, message_data: dict, channels: DatabaseStore) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read channel members list for validation

data_operations.description: Read channel data to check membership

constraints.description: Must validate user membership before proceeding

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns error if user is not a member of the channel

children.name: StoreMessage
children.purpose: Persist the validated message to the messages store.
children.behavior: Generate a new message_id, store the message entry (channel_id, user_id, content, timestamp) in the messages store, and return the message_id.
children.signature: def StoreMessage(prepared_message: dict, messages: DatabaseStore) -> str

global_vars.description: Write new message entry to messages store

constraints.description: Must generate unique message_id for each message

acceptance_criteria.description: Message is successfully stored and retrievable

children.name: UpdateUserLastSeen
children.purpose: Update the last_seen timestamp for the user in the users store.
children.behavior: Set the last_seen field of the user identified by user_id to the current timestamp.
children.signature: def UpdateUserLastSeen(user_id: str, users: DatabaseStore) -> bool

global_vars.description: Read user data to verify existence before update

data_operations.description: Read user data to verify existence

constraints.description: Must verify user exists before updating last_seen

acceptance_criteria.description: User's last_seen is updated to current timestamp

children.name: NotifyChannelMembers
children.purpose: Notify all other members of the channel about the new message.
children.behavior: Retrieve the list of members from the channel store (excluding the sender), and for each member, trigger a notification (e.g., update a notification log or push event).
children.signature: def NotifyChannelMembers(channel_id: str, user_id: str, channels: DatabaseStore) -> bool

global_vars.description: Read channel members list for notification dispatch

constraints.description: Must exclude sender from notification list

acceptance_criteria.description: All channel members except sender are notified

children.name: RetrieveMessageHistory
children.purpose: Retrieve the last 100 messages from a channel, sorted by timestamp descending.
children.behavior: Query the messages store for all messages with the given channel_id, sort by timestamp descending, limit to 100, and return the list.
children.signature: def RetrieveMessageHistory(command: str, message_data: dict, messages: DatabaseStore) -> list

global_vars.description: Read messages from store for history retrieval

constraints.description: Must return maximum 100 messages sorted by timestamp descending

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns up to 100 messages sorted by timestamp descending

children.name: CreateChannel
children.purpose: Create a new channel with a unique name, set the caller as creator and first member.
children.behavior: Check if channel name already exists in channels store. If not, generate a new channel_id, store the channel with name, members list containing user_id, and created_by as user_id. Return success with channel_id.
children.signature: def CreateChannel(command: str, message_data: dict, channels: DatabaseStore) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read to check uniqueness, write to store new channel

data_operations.description: Check channel name uniqueness and store new channel

acceptance_criteria.description: New channel is created with unique name and user as first member

children.name: JoinChannel
children.purpose: Add a user to a channel's member list if not already a member.
children.behavior: Check if user_id is already in the members list of the channel. If not, append user_id to members list and update the channel store. Return success.
children.signature: def JoinChannel(command: str, message_data: dict, channels: DatabaseStore) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read to check membership, write to update members list

data_operations.description: Check membership and update members list

acceptance_criteria.description: User is added to channel members if not already present

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: messages (read_write) covered by StoreMessage (write) and RetrieveMessageHistory (read) - combined read+write satisfies read_write requirement. users (read) covered by UpdateUserLastSeen (read). channels (read_write) covered by CreateChannel (read_write) and JoinChannel (read_write). All parent requirements satisfied.
